provenance.note: Hand-curated source for the Vallejo Game Color Ink range. hobby-desk-data (our canonical upstream) does not carry the Game Ink line, so this file pins the range explicitly. Line-up (12 SKUs, 72.082-72.094, no 72.092) cross-checked 2026-07-17 against a stockist dump with EAN codes (mhollink/miniature-inventory scripts/paints/vallejo/input/game-color.json) and piemasters/MiniToTheMax src/data/paints/vallejo/game.ts; hex swatches from MiniToTheMax. RGB is an approximate reference colour (inks are transparent).
